CIPHER.973.cipherString: It is an abnormal day, as many individuals discover themselves acquiring, completing, and submitting examinations instead of doomscrolling.
CIPHER.973.question: Solve this quote that has been encoded using the Aristocrat Cipher. What does it say?

CIPHER.974.cipherString: creating the fiction that it's a real world that exists independent of you
CIPHER.974.question: The following is a quote from William Pellen from game developer Team Cherry, creators of Hollow Knight and Sillksong. It has been encoded as a Checkerboard cipher with a Polybius key of ENTOMOLOGISTS. What does it say?

CIPHER.976.cipherString: Transcripts are not ready to be sent to colleges just yet.
CIPHER.976.question: A message in a bottle washed up in the school's decorative fountain—decode this Nihilist Substitution cipher text with a keyword of GRADES and polybius key of APPLICATION. What does it say?

CIPHER.977.cipherString: Make making friends as simple as a click bringing diverse communities together the social world connects all of us
CIPHER.977.question: The login screen on your school-issued Chromebook changed to the following scrambled text. It holds a poem encoded as a Complete Columnar. The quote has CLICK somewhere in it. What does it say?

CIPHER.978.cipherString: Everyone knows that while the podium may be quite prestigious, it remains that those in second are hardly written in history.
CIPHER.978.question: You found the following Aristocrat message on a sticky note adhered to the back of last year's Science Olympiad trophy. It was encoded using a K3 alphabet. What was the K3 Key Phrase used to encode it?

CIPHER.979.cipherString: Calculate the impulse a deer striding across a high school campus imparts on a girl minding her own business.
CIPHER.979.question: Oh deer! You find the following text in the margin of your physics textbook, but you can't read it until you decode it! It's encrypted as an Aristocrat cipher. What does it say?

CIPHER.980.question: An old robot prototype suddenly prints this encoded text. It's a quote, encrypted using a Cryptarithm. What do the values 493978 4669584 32049 decode to?

CIPHER.981.cipherString: The ice pick is not in her hand; it is her hand
CIPHER.981.question: You receive this puzzling text during a live science broadcast. It contains a quote, encrypted as a Baconian. What does it say?

CIPHER.982.cipherString: He is extremely knowledgeable of water engineering and has worked to ensure that the house and driveway work well.
CIPHER.982.question: The following quote about a Toebes family house project has been encoded as a Complete Columnar cipher for you to solve. If you know that the plaintext contains WORKED, what does it say?

CIPHER.975.cipherString: This is applying logical reasoning to hypothetical situations, which in this case is trying to make the most money in the game.
CIPHER.975.question: The following quote about economics needs to be decoded with the Patristocrat Cipher using a K2 alphabet. You are told that the cipher ends with GAME. What does it say?

CIPHER.983.cipherString: Education for students passionate about STEM
CIPHER.983.question: Looking through the promotional materials for the PCEP STEM Academy, you find the following weird groups of seemingly random words. They actually are a Baconian cipher that ends with the word STEM. What does it say?

CIPHER.984.cipherString: If anyone has any questions or concerns on anything, this is my primary email and the best way to communicate with me.
CIPHER.984.question: The following text is a passage sent through email from the Swim and Dive coach, but it's been encoded as an Aristocrat. What does it say?

CIPHER.985.cipherString: have some delicious food from our nationally recognized culinary team
CIPHER.985.question: You receive an anonymous text message containing a coded passage. It's said to be a quote, encrypted with a Fractionated Morse. You are told that the quote has NARY in it corresponding to the encoded text G M S V J, meaning G = –●×; J = ––×; M = ●–×; S = ●–●; V = ×–●. What does it say?

CIPHER.986.cipherString: Stuff to remember tomorrow: Mountain Dew, coffee, two mice, chargers, computer, binder, and my partner.
CIPHER.986.question: Your Codebusters partner sent you the following text before a big tournament. Because Codebusters is so cool, they decided to encode it for you as an Aristocrat. What K1 keyword did they use to encrypt it?

CIPHER.987.cipherString: Don't forget to submit that assignment on canvas.
CIPHER.987.question: Your school's intercom crackled to life with static… then spelled out this Hill message with a keyword of BOLD. What does it say?

CIPHER.988.cipherString: Citing and installing commercial and individual wind applications, power transmission, distribution systems, and power storage systems.
CIPHER.988.question: The following note slipped out of last year's Wind Power binder. You forgot that you'd encoded it as a K2 Aristocrat so other teams wouldn't see it. What does it say?

CIPHER.989.cipherString: Allows high school students to enroll in college courses
CIPHER.989.question: The following information about dual enrollment has been encrypted as a Baconian cipher for you to solve.

CIPHER.990.cipherString: I hate the Moor, and it is thought abroad that 'twixt my sheets has done my office. I know not if't be true, but I will do as if for surety
CIPHER.990.question: You found the following Aristocrat cipher written on a slip of paper in friend's binder. Your friend is a huge Shakespeare fanatic and you think it is part of a screenplay they're writing. Maybe a “Taming of the Shrew meets the modern-day aesthetic” vibe? You think it's rather nonsense, but you'll pull out your monocle and embody Shakespearean times if they'll give you the lead in the play… if you can figure out what it says.

CIPHER.991.cipherString: Nuestra misión es proveer oportunidades para la desarrolla de las habilidades técnicas y personales para todos los miembros.
CIPHER.991.question: This Spanish-language description of a school club (Lightning Robotics) has been encoded as a K2 Xenocrypt for you to solve.

CIPHER.992.cipherString: Our highly qualified teaching staff, with extensive experience and advanced degrees, ensures that students excel in core subjects.
CIPHER.992.question: The Plymouth-Canton Educational Park (PCEP) is a unique, large high school campus in Canton, Michigan, housing three distinct high schools (Salem, Plymouth, and Canton High Schools) on one site. The following is a promotional quote from its website.

CIPHER.993.cipherString: Looking to give back to your community? Join the key club for service today.
CIPHER.993.question: This quote is taken from the flyer for a school club. It has been encoded as a Porta with a keyword of HONEST. What does it say?

CIPHER.994.cipherString: ¿Quieres aprender a qué pintores hispanos se les conocía como ‘El elefante y la hormiga’ o cuál es el río navegable más alto del mundo?
CIPHER.994.question: The following quote has been taken from the AP Spanish homepage. However, it's been encoded as a K1 Xenocrypt. What does it say?

CIPHER.995.question: You found the following weird equation on a slip of paper in your team's homeroom. It's written using a Cryptarithm Cipher. What do the values 86498 739968 decode to?

CIPHER.996.cipherString: Imagine sitting between oversized tables and having a bucket for bathrooms for five hours.
CIPHER.996.question: The following describes an actual event that took place several years ago, encoded as a K1 Aristocrat. What does it say?

CIPHER.997.cipherString: Your overall project-wide configuration sets up application loading, database connections and other variables for your project in this file.
CIPHER.997.question: The following quote from your coding class has been encoded as a K2 Aristocrat. What was the keyword used to encode it?

CIPHER.998.cipherString: When I draw my manga, I try to develop it differently than the fans' expectations
CIPHER.998.question: The following quote by Ryoko Kui, the creator of Delicious in Dungeon, has been encoded as a Checkerboard cipher with a keyword of MONSTROSITY. What does it say?

CIPHER.999.cipherString: We can't control our outcomes, but rather our actions that we take.
CIPHER.999.question: Some friendly alums have provided the following piece of advice for students applying to college. It has been encoded as a Nihilist cipher with a Polybius key of VISHNU and a keyword of RELIGION. What does it say?

CIPHER.1000.cipherString: We are one of the very few schools in the country to have three schools built on one campus.
CIPHER.1000.question: A PCEP student's journal mentions a “hidden truth” encoded below. It turns out to be a quote, written in a Fractionated Morse Cipher. You are told that the quote has CHOO in it corresponding to the encoded text F C R A M W O, meaning A = ●●×; C = ●–●; F = ●×–; M = –––; O = –×●; R = ×●●; W = ×––. What does it say?

CIPHER.1001.cipherString: Chinese and Roman civilizations each combined innovations with their own proven traditions to make more enduring political systems.
CIPHER.1001.question: Your AP World History teacher provided the following information for you on your assignment sheet so you could use it on the upcoming test. However, it was encrypted as a K1 Patristocrat. You are pretty sure that CIVIL is contained wholly within one of the blocks of 5. What does it say?
